Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
The patient shows elevated creatinine, suggesting impaired renal function, and mildly increased ALT, indicating possible liver involvement. Lipid profile reveals high total and LDL cholesterol with low HDL, increasing cardiovascular risk. Globulin is low, which may reflect protein synthesis or immune issues. Other parameters are within normal limits. Recommend further evaluation of renal and liver function and management of dyslipidemia.
Provider Organization: Centro Privado de Educación Especial Parálisis Cerebral Infantil
